## Summary
- What changed?
- Why now?

## Linked issue
- Required: `Closes #<issue>`
- Closes #

## Scope
- [ ] repo/workflow
- [ ] frontend
- [ ] backend
- [ ] governance/product docs
- [ ] infra/deploy

## Validation
- Commands/checks run:
- Evidence:

## Risk + rollback
- Risk impact:
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist
- [ ] Issue-first flow followed
- [ ] Branch from fork used
- [ ] No direct push to protected default branch
- [ ] Roadmap mapping updated (or excluded rationale added) when issues open/close/re-scope
